reviews.review_description: This game is basically a gorilla tag Halloween version. This game is super fun. Right now i believe the servers are down right now. It gives you 100K Shiny Rocks when u start and has the Halloween flashback sale. But from my experience in this game it is super fun.

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no absolute reason
reviews.review_description: So I joined this code called well and then I was teaching the gorillas how to summon Lucy 5 seconds later I got banned for 48 hours. But gorilla tag is still cool so 5 stars
